title: illigera pentaphylla
intro: Illigera pentaphylla is a species of plant in the family Hernandiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Illigera pentaphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in capsules or powder form.
